title: KION | Vanilla Modpack
description: The only performance modpack you'll ever need.
body:
# 🎮My ModPack KION
**KION** Optimized build complementing visual effects while trying not to affect the gameplay,increased Optimization for comfortable play on **Vanilla** project or in **Single World**
# 🔮Update/Release
**Updates and Releases** happen often when I understand that the build is ready and there are no shortcomings in it, but I also try to take into account **bugs and crashes**, to bring the build to perfection
# **💾Example Versions**
- **v1.0.0-Alpha** – Alpha build of version 1.0.0
- **v1.0.0-Beta** – Beta build of version 1.0.0
- **v1.0.0-Release** – Stable release of version 1.0.0
 # **📮Support & Community**
For help, bug reports, or feedback, join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/c4aN6YQJvH)
- **Unfortunately, Modring is no longer available in Russia. Please subscribe to my Discord Group to keep up with the [KION-Discord-Group ](https://discord.gg/c4aN6YQJvH) build.**
- **Also, the Kion build pauses build updates.**
